* * *
We fought **_hard_** to win this race in 2018.
Election experts everywhere kept a close eye on this team, waiting to see if we could pull off what hadn’t been done in _two decades_ : electing a Democratic Governor in Nevada.
Our race was deemed a toss-up and we faced an uphill battle to combat the tens of millions in outside spending from national Republicans -- but together we built a people-powered movement that made victory possible.
**Now as we gear up for a tough re-election campaign, we’re facing a huge hurdle:** Beginning in the new year, state law requires that fundraising for our campaign come to a halt for the duration of the legislative session.
That means that for the next 6 months, our opponents will have a head start on fundraising for a re-election campaign that experts are saying _will “look a lot like 2018.”_
We know that early money is critical to a successful campaign -- a well-stocked warchest signals that this race will be difficult to challenge, fends off interest from national Republicans, and discourages investment from right-wing super PACs.
**So I’m asking for your help: Our campaign has set a goal to raise $25,000 before 11:59 PM on January 1st.****[We know that this is ambitious, but we’re determined to keep this seat blue and continue fighting for progress in Nevada. Can I count on you to chip in $25, $15, or any amount before the fundraising blackout begins ?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3jlCQA7GjIoNjXSjTpNiOYFCm6NIXFAU28Em3RcPMgR_d927HyeW9VixDuIGtfyyAtFT80otsmCHdpaaw2nBYifii1zlhS7GEdZEQxL0sF-DI97fV22zf1aKu_EOFomElyYt9b3S8HFP0OvbZh5prxVqQQUWF8LyieLLXIe8IGM8XTumI7bnbATz-q95K-ESxSNZTzj-OKJSWGH6H8xclEbYGz7k7MEi8u0B2_eSYhJc6MEQKp_FnJecSpZqtBxTJvPSvfBwDPcyzCw-JoNsCdhzheXPfQwyxQQEhSR-7_ZqJcqtWfUjLCHP8hFwsTYU/383/XxfQj1WLQj2m2fFKT76W_w/h6/cZrSKZNIrBk1-jhM51GcwY6xHRUaapCSQWkUg4LDmq4)**

name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN SOUTHWEST GEORGIA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2020 PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN SOUTHWEST GEORGIA
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler traveled to Southwest Georgia yesterday for two campaign stops to encourage early voting. She started the day in Albany - where she was greeted by a crowd of fired up patriots - before heading to Columbus for another great stop. Both of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of energized supporters - sending a strong message that Georgia will hold the line against socialism and save our country. To find your polling location, click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r2Pu4PE01VYW2tMDyr5TRLwemWIqOQl0LWCk8PocuDIDdUaY05JuCL2szEG45zS4hlpG4YV740E0Uc04XekKLoowcXBAeDSmA7o3AZ7_ioBcrzXHh6fGxdA-WtjqEdB_8sBQJSof-TqlqHnsIyZuOGvGx6Om7GoQq_Go5WGGg6k=&c=pu8g4ZVrAissYHFVtuYwzFthQFj__CD5NiuUUhVvSX-ZieQ64JeKKg==&ch=03NAMI0Xk5tkvoiB9ldDeKBBZvxuwCzdc2et4pwMUmd_ImB-XlEsDg==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2020 PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN SOUTHWEST GEORGIA ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler traveled to Southwest Georgia yesterday for two campaign stops to encourage early voting. She started the day in Albany - where she was greeted by a crowd of fired up patriots - before heading to Columbus for another great stop. Both of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of energized supporters - sending a strong message that Georgia will hold the line against socialism and save our country. | | Friend, Do you have a second, friend? I want to run our plan for the next week past you. I know you're incredibly busy this time of year, but the next few weeks are very important for the House DFL. Even though the election just ended, we need to start making plans and raising money for the next one. We are so close to reaching our 2020 fundraising goal, but we need your help to make this month one of our best fundraising months yet. Can you help us? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gWVNdD-5HnBTaAB3aWlpx2QPMKv-hbDggsuIG6ZmFiI=/rCr9TfgA3pe056huWhOtOtuH5xJKXtENFoeiVJly9Q0=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=EOY1) _ _ [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gWVNdD-5HnBTaAB3aWlpx2QPMKv-hbDggsuIG6ZmFiI=/rCr9TfgA3pe056huWhOtOtuH5xJKXtENFoeiVJly9Q0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=EOY1) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gWVNdD-5HnBTaAB3aWlpx2QPMKv-hbDggsuIG6ZmFiI=/rCr9TfgA3pe056huWhOtOtuH5xJKXtENFoeiVJly9Q0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EOY1) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gWVNdD-5HnBTaAB3aWlpx2QPMKv-hbDggsuIG6ZmFiI=/rCr9TfgA3pe056huWhOtOtuH5xJKXtENFoeiVJly9Q0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EOY1) _ _ [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gWVNdD-5HnBTaAB3aWlpx2QPMKv-hbDggsuIG6ZmFiI=/rCr9TfgA3pe056huWhOtOtuH5xJKXtENFoeiVJly9Q0=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=EOY1) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Also, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded to you by the state. name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: BOMBSHELL: VICTIM GOES ON RECORD, CONFIRMS CHILD ABUSE AT WARNOCK'S SUMMER CAMP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2020 BOMBSHELL: VICTIM GOES ON RECORD, CONFIRMS CHILD ABUSE AT WARNOCK'S SUMMER CAMP
ATLANTA - Today, bombshell evidence has definitively proven that child abuse was occurring under Raphael Warnock's purview at Camp Farthest Out in the early 2000s. In a shocking, on-the-record statement, one of the campers confirms the extent of the abuse he suffered while attending Warnock's camp, revealing what Warnock worked so hard to cover up. As [reported](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5yuvxLtVBkS5aBehStkZt4whoLii5mxUvWAXiTg55cdnb57281s5w4EVSWI70IwaOIqhckvGQtVcd12FsCwg2M2wn4W-hBb-Vr_vPO83rOYuu1ViS1zFSflzxmlmVKuMT0sBxIZCtNZN-EvggcsLbswR-DYRYvnctHbE_oB_0zWl&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) by the Washington Free Beacon:
"Among the indignities 12-year-old Anthony Washington endured at the church camp overseen by Reverend Raphael Warnock: counselors who tossed urine on him and locked him outside his cabin overnight...
"Washington, now 30, recounted the events in an interview with the Washington Free Beacon and said his experience at the camp resulted in a 2003 lawsuit that ended two years later, when Washington says he and his family received a large financial settlement...
"As a punishment for wetting his bed, [Washington] said a counselor forced him to spend the next night sleeping outside by himself on the basketball court ... Counselors also threw urine on him from a bucket they used when there wasn't a bathroom nearby ... Washington said he saw counselors 'grab kids' ... Campers were prohibited from calling their parents, he said."
This breaking news comes on the heels of other major [revelations](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5wPNjV886WJjfYkCiagc8SV6REq0ADfXvuL_z34ZdIGbGj7HglsvM2vi1805pbxbdNxubkbVWkFt-DIIRH4H27jnLEt3Xz_tcU4zF9rntpg_GzcNmaW8gs1_ykioEvTXDmDt2KTS7Q8gc9gtF2SXK8TYvg96Hvdgz33BlFca2dsw&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) about this [incident](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5wPNjV886WJj14_w_ZSMq6vV22ebR-_e9KTZ9O-9IP3wjVqSGS_s_Pai4apoeYX2MwMc9Q1zOjzE0xNWGbN0D1rBLDAUxwfnEuRUUs5GM3uM0plhbTOQwV2rvtzoUwTfDgg3crvdwszGNOWrxyFTwZHYmhM2TY5Gag==&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==). Recently uncovered documents [revealed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH59EMIdCG4g3a90rEa1o1S7IeL-Q3jRzOYhmBz2kjU6A2BiyYJtV1cjOdnk-f4VeFBytzloxOt3klyrbs5GFOmhQZQ0NTdmC5kzZ2yegVbx1KEKKbSxbW68lReiQ8KM66w2UihSd4qBAolUpwEysCA8akxoxL6kjw8vLD0JBStOL_Hbar37BPVSk=&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) that Camp Farthest Out was shut down in 2003 just a year after Warnock's arrest after numerous safety-code violations. That same year, the civil suit mentioned above also [emerged](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5yP3rb-Hzc--ZJsNdwEhZCPltjHxhOrQF_YipRlazPbnvKC6y0O_kAUjadKfAgbZ7iEAAC_VGxnTPkpqPiZ1eT3XxGBb_d1QxuGKGh-3UD77ZNKrJrfKrwpFQzQ8VxXtmQ==&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) against Warnock, the camp and other individuals, one of whom - an apparent camp staffer - was [arrested](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5yuvxLtVBkS5Flhe1ZLLM1v4RCNzhWlaIgAcEnVMrOh-QjcdLo4yfwWvgpnF2gMqMGjtvaLCNOg8VmiIirtsbPn0yRnJ5wBxRRgUYBu87TMavf6NZk4L3Q0MTR_xnOAEwxRRTD3coVtMf__WhyftTvNSqbnX9JW2f4eWTV0AT2384xLfWvFgPiNOw3HgOdT9FqgM3WJ5s5v02hz5dJrjozo=&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) for assault just three weeks after Warnock's arrest.
To this day, Warnock has [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH59EMIdCG4g3a2IvfJ5X2qqQczAhm3z4K2cs4RcwLv4An_Tql0zGnrpVpKI0eGuKHygdNfMHAvyiTnRJ0fZpVc4EdHaAiXVWiHOqAi3pH1bAGF33NaglWj2V_89F7RjQMIa7Swjxn1cGj&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==) to answer any questions about what happened during his years supervising Camp Farthest Out - even when asked directly. Now we know why, and Raphael Warnock owes the people of Georgia a full explanation.
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00101LpOj75oVJPJGgyG-fR6Ol960Y3Ns1dG3E2vbOj-ZdzlAVlgyUH5-9mHGsk-1rE6-v-nP2eXZyA3yK6BSdFicvacwlUey7HyUDx4aQFhnBsM9H0nxXC5orAsgsDidEHh2eAqVRztGXS1eqydLyB__QkDbJyClIo&c=qag-AsDUNsHUwu_UOreXXa9ds6PscnUgMTnLXaR3dC1Muw6HCsE3IA==&ch=hFVK6xMMsJ9AgoEKQ36XwpHzxHX5a5Wrgs3us_ZOvyItXmgQsLQRgg==)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

name: Dr. Ronny Jackson - Congressman-Elect (TX-13)
subject: Congress MUST investigate voter fraud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
The allegations are serious.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cj6mBF3AKR963YCxpDoaN-AGQvhm95GUzZ_q6TSnFZiVwgcG4btiV_tA-8m4vUeUQbqYrcX0sM9FF4bokkbUACjy0Bb0_6zfzNx2l7hM37qepU-D9HL_bO332CpdBPRZYJc50g6zEfr-XjK-Dw2WUI7ut3BdKTvFhxwtHNtChEGvNLbkv4I1oJrrIfWDqX6tNjw1zemNsSvHCSzA3wDTWfjUfsak8KAj_6GPSS6SOAebOZLHU5auy8bbImRDQDdbuO9v0CzheX_FliI_H2-V3gqBLZY0qdN8lIcu7ooq52W8WyHW3lrqJ_e_WPpKCkmYoGJLCP8HhurajjdXw9rTTYBxA3uZ9LLgoDTvyTb2YtjTyyXfFG3Ie-RtlvfCznf01u9Xu8DR1jaJoRCQGM0jkPAHBhmNlx_njH5i0-Xvp8oSCL4QyJymp3PyqQoHJjx13bh-lf3TF0qFvlmnYumIV5rCmB8BuaDKINOA4giPfPN2DQ7J5JkMdw==&c=kNS8UNsR2Wk0fg7FFBLx-lzNLLimeWMUV-VfLvABCiG5OLQ7-3UgMw==&ch=v6LCRU7O2dKwxyioBLOMzq_ILVoUneUPK4XFsAp2Fsgte-KMc_qxrA==)

This is Dr. Ronny Jackson reaching out to you about my efforts to DEMAND that Nancy Pelosi investigates the widespread allegations of voter fraud. I'm a former Senior Advisor to President Trump, his former White House Physician, and Congressman-Elect for the most pro-Trump district in the nation -- _**and I 'm extremely concerned about the Democrat's attempts to ignore obvious voter fraud. **_ **That 's why just last week I partnered with 25 recently elected Congressman to DEMAND that Congress launches an investigation into every single serious voter fraud allegation that the Fake News media is ignoring. ** I've never backed down from defending President Trump, and I certainly won't stop now -- but I need your help. **In just a few short days my last fundraising deadline of the year will be here ... and I need to make sure that I have the resources to fight back against the attacks the Radical Left's going to be throwing at me. ** I know that times are tough for some, but if you're able to donate just a few dollars, we've decided that we will 3X MATCH every dollar that we receive BEFORE midnight. ****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dwe86exHBYmXq6XzXnzm8zA6u_STwHTag2oiD6t_oUNDq7S7K7f4HIn73GcO5MWmWHBhKB2PTVcTBSEUkQPCag8blkduN7Rgx6g-IuH28u2JUHhjdW7SX72CfztlyxqYRuQZYg6uMM0CoNxW0yOGGn6JYy3qe9zbQmGa3HoJ9xTa7yu_n-OPO6S4NJdO48ycR47GIbU9hlq8LSTKS1ok8jIXr2SMoAYFraRpGLDKPBpvk9F8k97cNKUF6cnLFgkQMrfSYNO3052y-N0S2rRba6xcY1vZTOaNCz-K_-8TYLe3C-XOGYMxvr7tXv-hAmJLBKEI7ItcaHrJUx59XDEPCxwxX8svuYOUQ0VEpqeR_yYZ0KxL7ryy3OEoweyzkVg6DzC5wWWQlb4_2RM_1DE9txXJ2MMh7ZTQyhZ3OBj4ccZQzaFCdzwbom9tmdXEhkgHGFBS72HvU3k=&c=Pg1_jpAS4rdJWB6MAaezpXjm4V5EpNCAzWmhko28Rzj6sSSBCFpDDQ==&ch=djV38ore_ghlZz-iuj4fgj_C5mKVvtJJdsPwoBhXJdnlY-KE1m_vqg==)
_Friend, did you know English is Michelle 's third language?_ Born in Korea and raised in Japan, Michelle came to America as a young woman hoping for a better future.

But then the California State Board of Equalization unfairly taxed her mother's small business. As a single-mom and immigrant, Michelle's mother lacked the resources and ability to fight it. It was then and there Michelle decided enough was enough. The Democrats' socialist agenda wasn't solving the issues of affordability, homelessness, sky-high taxes, and excessive red tape --_it was actually making things worse._

Since then, Michelle has been California's taxpayer champion -- returning $400 million to taxpayers, pledging to fight against tax increases, and stop any new taxes. In Congress, Michelle will continue to fight for lower taxes... [**but right now she needs your help.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dwe86exHBYmXq6XzXnzm8zA6u_STwHTag2oiD6t_oUNDq7S7K7f4HDNHKunYCcbahD-t_3QPqBiDuZsZIGGiUynpM03NYaAZqyATDxdrW6VYHPqHbuaUMhrERcSpOXuEztmhCMgrcS7OqxZ6j0CwRT4l1B6Xs-S_Z9LSm4ZrBSGIgItr7eaJGuml40Fuy8q4SBYJJdkunbkwBS6NIrpVn1VOxXWXhKnLgZNDEbGtVcauTQzqd6fQYkWv3P3EqYy_ODvg2DUMij_2aHfFiyWLwOD4bGownP-Ty-NtDk2s-FaBlzGw9izwcrdOJ_h3f7yBBw5QvfhL0ziQrsRF2yfKCiB2O2JxItvvXX_5zUGYWr5dblPkPiCQjq-A02_hJuw6S_goiYvfM-sGS7CnDghZFhtPyY2qGZ2g_dqHFwjUZ0_F9cTar37d6rmGFC57c8Il&c=Pg1_jpAS4rdJWB6MAaezpXjm4V5EpNCAzWmhko28Rzj6sSSBCFpDDQ==&ch=djV38ore_ghlZz-iuj4fgj_C5mKVvtJJdsPwoBhXJdnlY-KE1m_vqg==)

**The FEC 's end of quarter deadline is Friday at midnight. Friend, I am reaching out to you today because we are approaching our most important deadline of the year. Our End of the Year deadline will decide our financial plan for the new year, and since I am up for re-election this cycle, it will be devastating if we miss it. That is why I am unlocking a 500% MATCH until 11:59 PM so that we can keep Indiana and the Senate RED. == == == == == I cannot express how important this deadline is, Friend. If we miss it, it will set us back months. There are only a couple of hours left with this offer. Will you help me out? Friend, the clock is **RUNNING OUT** and _I 'm starting to get nervous._

Our [**BIGGEST deadline**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tlJVVKjTBnkc9YsCURr4ln6zc0-3hap8zAHyOqaO-dkPCz3f0w5ALrzXkIkRuoR2M6U_IlNdChn2gTzUwDB1Dns7Op6RR4XLTeaEM3k4cjtey-7jvy_iGX6dyHr8PWCE2dn77AUqxn94R7kXpS37a662mWVDilSi5aFZPKDXncWWbuoKMPml-gX0mFJkLNQkU3hLmXsFS_JtLLLJLBpzWW66N-iYEeY-4HhS-RZzIWyzP4a14tc1fu2CPeSWFDp2_e1IGvqePYxMkUpYnlhSJwUY224c2WGr7TR66O4afQCfTSR2S_qkQ6agqR55op5Y6bTzPIcn-P_1fOIMGxsrf-APQkF5h1PcQokdb9UczDan6K9eclKdftVH6YS-GRk-ScSPd4MFrnUaP9YX89lZ0QphzytekA8u&c=eAzeKIZC3s55ZXzMJL_TO9UkFIAwIuhHhNZmZAuHUngGkj2LRa-3sQ==&ch=Z1mhLXEuanGJcTHZgHoacnfZulTiqOPva58Kzh4Vuyr5FQa_SP-Zbw==) is approaching in just a few days and we are still WAY behind our goal.

I reached out this morning, after talking to the finance team and let you know how far behind we were and asked for your help. Unfortunately, I have to reach out again and ask for you to step up.

As of late this afternoon, we are **STILL $401,789.56 SHORT** of our End-of-Year goal. Friend,

We flipped California's 39th Congressional District RED, a seat only recently turned blue by Nancy Pelosi and a self-funded millionaire opponent. They spent millions in dark money, tapped into our opponent's personal fortune, and spent $20+ million to defeat us -- but despite their massive war chests and outspending us at every turn, _we won. _

name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: Wanted to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rutledge for Governor

I'm a proud christian, pro-life, gun-carrying, conservative mom and i'm running to be the next Governor of the state of Arkansas.

Friend,

I wanted to take a moment and introduce myself. I'm Leslie Rutledge. I'm a proud christian, pro-life, gun-carrying, conservative mom **and I 'm running to be the next Governor of the state of Arkansas.**

In my five years as attorney general of Arkansas, we've **FOUGHT** for conservative policies; _and our promises have never been just political talking points._

As Attorney General I've:
* **MADE ARKANSAS FIRST** in defense of the unborn
* **FOUGHT BACK** against Washington radical liberal big-government power plays
* **HELPED PROTECT** independent pharmacies from Pharmacy Benefit Managers.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GT37ebjgphF6gr4vh4PTWpdHoIMyVKXiOakBrAxz7kc=/wphA7haXo3hOz3XNgwzfto2JQLqeLLcY8pGUUJPns_g=)
**We cannot be what we cannot see.**
That's why, along with my colleagues in the Hispanic Caucus, I've been _adamant_ that the Biden-Harris transition team appoint more Latinas to their Cabinet.
As the first Latina _ever_ elected to a leadership position in Congress, I _know_ how much it means to see someone who looks and talks like you in a position of power. Not only is it reaffirming, it's _uplifting._
For too long, Latinas have been gated from those high-level positions. It's my promise, that as long as I'm in Congress, I will use my seat to **uplift** and **amplify** Latina voices.
I'm ready to do just that in 2021, but _first_ , I need to close out the year **strong. **
[**Will you help me hit my end-of-quarter fundraising goal before Thursday by pitching in anything you can right now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GT37ebjgphF6gr4vh4PTWpdHoIMyVKXiOakBrAxz7kc=/JRRJuL7s19s0Ty_vAnNMvndv2f8bYr1Qg2EjktSq2QE=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_122820_EOQ_B)

body:
Between higher gas taxes, destroying jobs, crushing American entrepreneurialism, driving Californians out of the state by the carload, do we really think he's doing the best he can for our state?

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gmkMgo5rTU8LsTUfsgY8w-tzatRR-_NcH9xZ5mx6URDYPFilu9rz1Anwtonx2PzBvWxZ1AdyTEbVZb4SiZNSQib0Hi_KbgGf_SKf_v-xe9zUQVf0sjh5NLhwm_hoddCQypI3Bcb4nmcmRedzoQ_14JNgRFci5sRCKuvLqubBao6uG5kqVrYjz6eGiNLidCaO6LO2nzx_En-8dt8tcSdrioAekZuST2kbhr4ft9veUTxxaO2I8A_bQyjTMiCD6BBLrae91uwU2yqIxIqPwwS6uDIcs98d7h7vUY_VWctlAnay7L_SEHxy5MxcGLTZhcZYJJ519HafWF5BZcC2gHlBOYN-6qMLPLk_bUz_hYEElt2UsI5IcjR9pzjYgABdy7mn&c=GOoHhx5dFw-eCzVBce8SgdvvYqaCDF-0bgmxGnf1a1DELtdPpzFHng==&ch=oK3-iSMh-dF0rBW5THWkTyCDrWASivf9wKreOP3r64ZKKzTJMAR-EA==)

718 days.

That's how long Gavin Newsom has been in office and how long he's had to drive California into the ground. Between higher gas taxes, destroying jobs, crushing American entrepreneurialism, driving Californians out of the state by the carload, _do we really think he 's doing the best he can for our state?_

We can't let him go another day unchecked. Friend,

Christmas (sadly) is in the rearview mirror.

But here’s the good news — that means 2021 is just around the corner and we’re moving on to bigger, better, and brighter things here in Indiana.

**New Year’s means just a little bit more this year. It’s a chance for Hoosiers to turn the page on the tragic and difficult year of 2020 and surge into the new year with optimism and hope. **

There’s light at the end of the tunnel, and most of us are happy to watch the calendar flip to 2021. We’re starting to make our New Year’s resolutions here at the Holcomb Crew, and we’re getting excited for what the new year will bring to Indiana.

We want to know — what are your New Year’s resolutions for 2021? **[Let us know what your goals and plans are for the new year below.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=635b0db9dbd14080a8885b7747962e5f&_e=x4TCuVqEz0WZkYiGBayV3PcojqOlkBEPVT_c36ywDuop1C3_ggTz-RA4lQYbZEzwlMDiGKAJjBv4ZvDr1QpTcEhVQrIG1JN1hehHJje62NH-dJJEJ58-8KELSlCOeHgIZR0vMv9Xfp2Jg90Fq1ZrC4oimmp6qKyjr1c0L-lWjOVZqCOCPkcRl88tmI1QZ8L3oJVOJN-8Fa9F89NWsplPu7Ip9nydrRnjpbA_U8j5_hw62JF-50TiT3qBaWP9TIwlpO1_wIMF4Jm4MCDi390Qni74PlH3i8vMxhWeX8R9G6V4MKRAZAbV6BxmuWFwFQ_hUKFrTcpaTD83I4rHjAajwEiHcOfEoSs4xeuAxrqh08Rt4GkDbhdblfOxo3R3IF0YJaft7NOsNMnYIpzs49rBvDQL8J0ewzxol73HLnZxpD-izj2GYQuOkNA8hXhWvNb2BACVERwyLym2in9D-uz1G3QeO9W83MsuYOO6pWfVIL-qe8jMCK28cWJF_gdvbwDL)**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=635b0db9dbd14080a8885b7747962e5f&_e=x4TCuVqEz0WZkYiGBayV3PcojqOlkBEPVT_c36ywDuop1C3_ggTz-RA4lQYbZEzwlMDiGKAJjBv4ZvDr1QpTcEhVQrIG1JN1hehHJje62NH-dJJEJ58-8KELSlCOeHgIZR0vMv9Xfp2Jg90Fq1ZrC4oimmp6qKyjr1c0L-lWjOVZqCOCPkcRl88tmI1QZ8L3oJVOJN-8Fa9F89NWsplPu7Ip9nydrRnjpbA_U8j5_hw62JF-50TiT3qBaWP9TIwlpO1_wIMF4Jm4MCDi390Qni74PlH3i8vMxhWeX8R9G6WwrAqxSLixJ48k-sCzaSkBHGMKX8lPq662U1WvN8xhDUYgU9P_RVKFeUp7iuFFKYVNROJTRNum2HHTrfJEvZqnAeSqa-TACvrECrze649pylmErNKxedCGJKF30kuqIrD_rqKvqt6Yz8620EnkNi1R11kRBrrcB6nG_9kSPKEDESFhlTFXInbn5KBMvo0Efft3cLWFvPNgRw13py5EK18z)
Thank you for sharing your New Year’s resolutions with us — you’ll be hearing from us soon.

Regards,

Holcomb Crew

name: My Faith Votes
subject: As a Christian, I would like to share this:
body:
| | Peter, My name is Lori and for the past year and a half, I’ve been following My Faith Votes on the internet from Minnesota. From the beginning, I’ve felt the awesome presence of the Holy Spirit within this organization, and I value the opportunity to fight for our Lord by preserving the nation He gifted us. In working with other volunteers, I have felt an abundance of support, encouragement, prayer, strength, fellowship, and divine focus – and as a result, I’ve never felt so safe in my faith. I’m sharing this with you because I want you to get a sense of the people on the ground helping to turn strategies into action, and in turn, **I would like to humbly ask for your support in our current, all-hands-on-deck efforts in Georgia.** When My Faith Votes reached out about helping to write and send handwritten postcards to targeted Georgia voters in the lead-up to the January 5th runoff, I knew it was a calling to do something good for God and country and I wanted to be a part of it. What a simple and personal way to reach out from one Christian voter to another. It’s not every day that voters in one state have the ability and opportunity to make such a momentous impact, and I wanted to do my part to remind them how important this runoff is for the entire nation. I recognize you have made the bold decision to stand faithfully by My Faith Votes as a monthly supporter, and for that, I am abundantly thankful. Because of the unique urgency we face in Georgia, [**may I ask you to prayerfully consider giving above and beyond your current support with an emergency donation? If we can raise $100,000 in grassroots donations it will unlock a matching grant from a generous donor.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=1 "Donate Now!") As you consider this investment, some people might feel like their vote doesn’t matter, but the truth is that these special runoff elections could be decided by just a handful of votes, and what we do all matters to God. In thinking about this, I am reminded of 2 Kings 6:8–23, in which Elisha is surrounded by the enemies in Dothan, and the Lord answers him, “Do not be afraid, for those who are with us are more than those who are with them.” . . .“and he (Elisha) saw...the mountain was full of horses and chariots of fire all around (him).” For the last year and a half, as I’ve been following My Faith Votes and now an active volunteer, I know how empowering it is. I want Christians in Georgia to feel the same way. [**As we reach them, Christian to Christian, I know we can make a difference on January 5th. Please help us make it happen with an emergency donation today.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=2 "Donate Now!") Your generosity and prayers are fueling an incredible organization with a wonderful mission, and I thank you. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=3) Blessing, Lori D.
Minnesota State Coordinator P.S. Please stand with My Faith Votes through an additional [special gift today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=4 "Donate Now!")! Your gift, no matter the size, will make all the difference in this critical upcoming election.
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=5)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=efIEplPzPLFMJBCThSjOzy9X6lEnjQLWVanwmfJV3rpiB00uQL2SsKOfB5-et1FU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201228apl01nd&n=11)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Get tested this week
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I hope that you had a wonderful holiday with the people in your household. As we wind down the year and look towards 2021, I have an important request for you: please get tested for COVID-19 this week.
Everyone who can get tested this week should do so. We saw spikes in our cases in the weeks following several other holidays this year, but a major testing push this week can help us significantly limit the spread of COVID-19. The more people who get tested over the next few days, the more we'll know about how the virus spread over the holiday, and the better we'll be able to target our response.
You can sign up for a free test at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDQvcaYh82hsK_nh_fPkzR1DumTlrZbgPo75OZfZ8Wq6UinModppm-q3azgB6jSI8dLB_t1KtJL4pnH7Cx-i2S-dTWeMJjDEICXjYXN-rz8FETN3xcCCUNLyhf-aGdqrpc2X2vFsbAs=&c=c7VLioDTQ3KiPxsXu107Kdt28Cn-9QYVY6YQ3myzNt1MGH_Z14UpjA==&ch=JcnMAFCPi0ixucn70WJhsJ-cFGVLRJ8zI9SRmqwcfPH2f2KPYB9MiQ==). Please be sure to tell your friends and family that they can get tested for free, too. It doesn't matter if you have symptoms or not -- we need you to get tested to know for sure.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDQvcaYh82hsK_nh_fPkzR1DumTlrZbgPo75OZfZ8Wq6UinModppm-q3azgB6jSI8dLB_t1KtJL4pnH7Cx-i2S-dTWeMJjDEICXjYXN-rz8FETN3xcCCUNLyhf-aGdqrpc2X2vFsbAs=&c=c7VLioDTQ3KiPxsXu107Kdt28Cn-9QYVY6YQ3myzNt1MGH_Z14UpjA==&ch=JcnMAFCPi0ixucn70WJhsJ-cFGVLRJ8zI9SRmqwcfPH2f2KPYB9MiQ==)
---
| We have same-day testing appointments available at sites across Rhode Island. Get tested and stay safe as we head into the new year.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xDQvcaYh82hsK_nh_fPkzR1DumTlrZbgPo75OZfZ8Wq6UinModppm0U2j_wV9xInuF0T47Io7rNypLxJMK9M2l9Dch6WikJB85rtc91HwjMeoGYOnE4USne5h7qSqHuqWnWoIu2ty8Wtb7Ub6pPsVWDl9rO7Ah8Va731BMFh45IEj76fTDtFe_ZRq4dMKBsVFkx3u8lFo8n7FjheUF8fofpRypi2x0vKy60M8ji69EytPhaAlX-sRnAmdyxOyx5bGompHcniD-wjsT3EXpBL8KZzxqaXVUceLWf7-jBhmy70N10CrbkrZhGFlJjv-Pw9mCgLNnZn8-E=&c=c7VLioDTQ3KiPxsXu107Kdt28Cn-9QYVY6YQ3myzNt1MGH_Z14UpjA==&ch=JcnMAFCPi0ixucn70WJhsJ-cFGVLRJ8zI9SRmqwcfPH2f2KPYB9MiQ==).
---
|

Make no mistake — in 2020 Virginians sent the message that Donald Trump’s hateful, slash and burn politics have no place in the Commonwealth.
Trump may be a one-term President, but Trumpism is alive and well in leading Virginia Republican candidate for Governor Amanda Chase.
Chase spreads dangerous far-right conspiracy theories. She marches, assault rifle in hand, with far-right militia groups.
Look, Amanda Chase might call herself “Trump in heels,” but let’s face it, that doesn’t go far enough.
She’s more Trump than Trump and if we don’t come together to stand up to her, all of the progress we’ve fought so hard for in Virginia could disappear in an instant.
**I promise you, if we have Terry’s back, we can stop a radical, conspiracy theorist like Amanda Chase from getting anywhere near the Governor’s office.**
**[To make sure Terry has the resources he needs to win in 2021, we’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 before the end of the year. Can you chip in right now and help us reach our goal before the deadline?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOWNNfMe88239v3QUOkymrzb8NuTeX66ljBo0rINoEyu3Hac4KfFeEOBC-XqDDSo3izeN6-C2B_YlcYeqBiBWXIRv1Wpm4Uo_EAWj01955Jpsw89dyjQIIkRs5lVMNKDXEJVQLlLt9Pl5kvl7gXLTIl6pDUKQGQFIhTBV_63F16mbJbfA6rk1S4jZ1T2MN5UC5GSehCHCZtc7eBzV0uqnmniMQ7N8aGO0nsyO1mceEbnZNHal0ziHrbX8NOwRVna8H-MWlR4VTrP7xor0WDO9tpJBqZxiQVCM6ExTs7JfOkvr/383/2j8XCw5wS2yhYu3zJ0r_Rg/h6/Pc6vAd03KQxU1xNBUiySs5vAver62gSvhnWAszw-MM0) **

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Volunteer for the January runoffs today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205da/1649601739/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Thank you for your hard work during the general election. Now we need to do it again, and the stakes couldn't be higher. Today, I need everyone who can to volunteer NOW in our final push to reach voters across Georgia and ensure their voices are heard. We are in the last eight days of this election, and now is the time to triple down on our work. Here's what you can do today: **Return your ballot or vote in person:** I've already returned my mail ballot in a drop box - have you? If you have requested and received a mail ballot, complete it, sign the oath on the back of the envelope, and return it as soon as you can using a drop box or at your county elections office. Once you've done that, ask your friends and family to do the same! If you plan to vote in person, Early Voting is open through December 30 or 31 depending on your county - find a location in your county at [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205db/1649601739/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/"). If you requested a ballot and did not yet receive it, you can vote early in person! Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested ballot and vote in person. **Join New Georgia Project 's Line Warming Day of Action:** Fair Fight is recruiting Line Warming volunteers for New Georgia Project's line warming program for this Wednesday, 12/30. As a volunteer, your job will be to make sure voters are safe, warm and comfortable while waiting to vote. Sign up to be a line warmer for one of the following counties: [Clayton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205d8/1649601739/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367577/"), [Chatham](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205d9/1649601739/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367578/"), [Muscogee](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e6/1649601739/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367579/"), [Bibb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e7/1649601739/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367580/"), [Cobb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e4/1649601739/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367581/"), [Dougherty](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e5/1649601739/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367582/"), [Richmond](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e2/1649601739/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367583/"), [Fulton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e3/1649601739/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367584/"), [Dekalb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e0/1649601739/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367586/"), [Gwinnett](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e1/1649601739/VEsHBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367587/") **Become a Ballot Curing Volunteer:** The Democratic Party of Georgia is recruiting volunteers to help voters whose ballots were rejected and ensure those ballots are cured. Attend a virtual training and learn how to knock on doors to ensure that Georgians' votes are counted as a part of DPG's Ballot Rescue team. [Sign up here. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205ee/1649601739/VEsHBg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/georgiademocrats/event/364558/") **Sign up as a Precinct Turnout Tracking volunteer with New Georgia Project:** On Election Day, the New Georgia Project Action Fund will be monitoring voter turnout throughout the day at key precincts around the state. NGPAF will use this information to allocate resources, like canvassers, texters, phone bankers and more. This is an in-person role which requires that you have a car to drive to between one and four polling precincts in your assigned county, follow COVID guidelines, get the total turnout three times a day, and report back. [Sign up here. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205ef/1649601739/VEsHAQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1h8A25gstnNe5tZOa22bCUfod36uqtmjqx4uyXnxVWbE/viewform?edit_requested=true") **Join New Georgia Project 's Election Day Line Warming:** Join New Georgia Project at polling places to make sure voters are safe, warm and comfortable while waiting to vote on Election Day, January 5, 2021! In this in-person role, you will be part of a comfort team sharing PPE, water, and snacks while following COVID guidelines. You can sign up to volunteer out of the following locations in shifts: [Muscogee](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205ec/1649601739/VEsHAA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367647/"), [Dougherty](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205ed/1649601739/VEsHAw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367650/"), [Richmond](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205ea/1649601739/VEsHAg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367651/"), [Chatham](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205eb/1649601739/VEsHDQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367646/"), [Gwinnett](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e8/1649601739/VEsHDA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367654/"), [Cobb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205e9/1649601739/VEsEBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367649/"), [DeKalb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f6/1649601739/VEsEBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367653/"), [Clayton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f7/1649601739/VEsEBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367645/"), [Fulton](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f4/1649601739/VEsEBg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367652/"), [Bibb](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f5/1649601739/VEsEAQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/ngp/event/367648/") **Call voters with Fair Fight:** With the final days of Early Voting underway and January 5 fast approaching, sign up to call voters across the state about making their plan to vote. You can find all of Fair Fight's upcoming phone banks at [https://www.mobilize.us/fairfight/](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f2/1649601739/VEsEAA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfight/"). Thank you for volunteering and for all that you do. Together, we can work to ensure every voice is heard and every vote is counted. Let's get it done. \- Stacey Abrams PS: We do this work to make Georgians' lives better. [Click here to watch a video](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f3/1649601739/VEsEAw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams/status/1343663773605896193?s=20") as a reminder of why we're in this fight. |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f0/1649601739/VEsEAg/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205f1/1649601739/VEsEDQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa33f/34a064cc/1d26dbf0/70205fe/1649601739/VEsEDA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: How The Barr DOJ Failed
body:
Attorney General Barr’s resignation amidst a contested presidential election dominated last week’s political airwaves. Recently, Fitton reminded viewers that “AG Barr or at least the Justice Department under AG Barr has been a black hole in terms of responding to Judicial Watch.” As Fitton reported, “they recently went to court to shut down all of our Clinton email investigations, discovery, and FOIA lawsuits – they don’t want us to do anything.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 28, 2020
---|---|---

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52413&L=21513&F=H&) | **[U.S. City May Pass “Duress Legislation” to Give Criminals “Poverty Defense”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52413&L=21513&F=H&)** Elected officials in a major U.S. city plan to pass a law that will allow thieves to sell items they steal if they do it to earn money for basic needs and trespassers to set up camp on private property when it is to obtain adequate shelter. Dozens of other crimes—including assault and harassment—will be excused under the preposterous measure if suspects are poor, mentally ill or addicted to drugs. It is being crafted as a poverty defense and will allow municipal court judges to dismiss a multitude of crimes if poverty, mental illness or a substance-abuse disorder drove the perpetrator to commit them. Recently, Fitton reminded viewers that “AG Barr or at least the Justice Department under AG Barr has been a black hole in terms of responding to Judicial Watch.” As Fitton reported, “they recently went to court to shut down all of our Clinton email investigations, discovery, and FOIA lawsuits – they don’t want us to do anything.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 28, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == “This smoking gun email ties Hunter Biden’s Burisma’s lobbying operation to an influence-peddling operation involving the Clinton campaign during the 2016 election,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “This further confirms the Obama-Biden-Deep State targeting of President Trump was to cover-up and distract from their own corruption.” == ---|--- | | | | = | = Attorney General Barr’s resignation amidst a contested presidential election dominated last week’s political airwaves. Recently, Fitton reminded viewers that “AG Barr or at least the Justice Department under AG Barr has been a black hole in terms of responding to Judicial Watch.” As Fitton reported, “they recently went to court to shut down all of our Clinton email investigations, discovery, and FOIA lawsuits – they don’t want us to do anything.” = ---|--- | | | | == | == Elected officials in a major U.S. city plan to pass a law that will allow thieves to sell items they steal if they do it to earn money for basic needs and trespassers to set up camp on private property when it is to obtain adequate shelter. Dozens of other crimes—including assault and harassment—will be excused under the preposterous measure if suspects are poor, mentally ill or addicted to drugs. It is being crafted as a poverty defense and will allow municipal court judges to dismiss a multitude of crimes if poverty, mental illness or a substance-abuse disorder drove the perpetrator to commit them. == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that former-Mayor Pete Buttigieg has agreed to search his personal emails, instead of being deposed by Judicial Watch, for records related to the creation of ID cards to help illegal aliens in South Bend, Indiana. ---|--- | | | == Fox News Judicial Watch made the agreement public the same day President-elect Joe Biden announced the nomination of his one-time Democratic primary rival to run the Department of Transportation. == Breitbart This week the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee opened hearings on the tainted election, taking testimony from election security experts and first-hand witnesses to fraud from contested states. “The fraud happened,” Kentucky Senator Rand Paul said. “The election in many ways was stolen.” == The Daily Caller The media’s motive is not hard to discern. Biden, who was running a lackluster non-campaign from his basement, had to be defended at all costs.
